chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 118 of 2013 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.1141/2013 15.10.2025 Mr. Imran Taj, advocate for the applicant Mrs. Dil Khurram Shaheen, advocate for respondent No.2 This reference application is pending since 2013 without any progress. Order sheet denotes that despite interim orders operating the matter has not been proceeded with by the applicant’s counsel and since then diary sheet demonstrates that on each date adjournment is being sought. Same was the case on the last date, i.e. 08.10.2025, when specific date was given, however, even today, learned counsel states that he is not in contact with the applicant and expresses inability. Accordingly, instant reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
